caption: The video features an elderly man with long, gray hair tied back, wearing glasses and a traditional shirt adorned with colorful patterns and a necklace. He is standing at a podium, speaking into a microphone. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background. The man seems to be addressing an audience, as suggested by the presence of another person's head in the foreground. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating that the event may be related to this organization. The man's posture and hand gestures suggest he is engaged in delivering a speech or presentation.
